context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the 4-tier structure with proper thresholds and multipliers, redemption rate and constraints, rolling annual points for tier qualification, upgrade bonuses, and refund point reversals.

checklist.name: Silver threshold
checklist.description: LOYALTY_TIERS defines Silver tier with minPoints of exactly 500

checklist.name: Gold threshold
checklist.description: LOYALTY_TIERS defines Gold tier with minPoints of exactly 1500

checklist.name: Platinum threshold
checklist.description: LOYALTY_TIERS defines Platinum tier with minPoints of exactly 5000

checklist.name: Tier multipliers
checklist.description: Multipliers are exactly: Member=1.0, Silver=1.5, Gold=2.0, Platinum=3.0

checklist.name: Redemption rate
checklist.description: Uses a redemption rate of 100 points per $1 (e.g. pointsToRedeem / 100 to calculate discount value)

checklist.name: Minimum redemption
checklist.description: Throws an error or rejects redemption requests below 500 points

checklist.name: Balance validation
checklist.description: Throws an error (e.g. 'Insufficient points balance') when pointsToRedeem exceeds customer's current loyaltyPoints

checklist.name: Single-use discount code
checklist.description: Creates the discount code with singleUse: true (or equivalent flag preventing reuse)

checklist.name: Discount code expiry
checklist.description: Sets the discount code to expire 30 days from creation (not some other duration)

checklist.name: Rolling 12-month earn for tier
checklist.description: Tier qualification uses points EARNED over the last 365 days (not current balance), e.g. sumEarnedInPeriod with since: subDays(new Date(), 365)

checklist.name: Upgrade bonus points
checklist.description: When a tier upgrade occurs, awards bonus points (e.g. calls earnPoints with reason 'signup' for the bonus)

checklist.name: Refund point reversal
checklist.description: Implements a reverseOrderPoints (or equivalent) function that debits/removes points earned from a refunded order

checklist.name: Tier upgrade email
checklist.description: Calls sendTierUpgradeEmail (or equivalent) when a customer upgrades tiers
